problem id: 5c4e308a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00110010 -> 10010000
  11011110 -> 11110011
  01000011 -> 00011001
  10001110 -> 01110010
  10101101 -> 01101010
  10011000 -> 11000010
  01010110 -> 10110001
  10100100 -> 00100010

query: 10000010
predicted answer: 00010010
